name: environment-executor-injection
description: IEnvironment.services already has backendRegistry (required) and queryValidator (optional). For Postgres execution, need to inject ISqlExecutor instance. Two approaches: (1) Add sqlExecutor to IEnvironment.services, or (2) Let PostgresBackend manage its own executor via constructor. Recommend approach (2) - PostgresBackend(executor) - because executor is backend-specific, not a general environment service.
recommendation: Keep ISqlExecutor out of IEnvironment. PostgresBackend owns its executor instance. This maintains clean separation - environment provides registry, backend owns execution details.
